name: spark-sql-runner
title: Spark SQL Runner
summary: Run SQL queries on Spark cluster and optionally export results as CSV

inputSpec.name: sqlfile
inputSpec.label: SQL file
inputSpec.help: File containing SQL queries separated by semicolons. Lines starting with -- are comments.

inputSpec.name: substitutions
inputSpec.label: Variable substitutions JSON
inputSpec.help: JSON file with variable substitutions for ${var} placeholders in SQL.

inputSpec.name: database_name
inputSpec.label: Default database
inputSpec.help: Default database to USE before running queries.

inputSpec.name: export
inputSpec.label: Export results as CSV
inputSpec.help: If true, export query results as CSV files.

inputSpec.name: export_options
inputSpec.label: Export options JSON
inputSpec.help: JSON file with export configuration: {"num_files": 1, "fileprefix": "result", "header": true}

inputSpec.name: collect_logs
inputSpec.label: Collect cluster logs
inputSpec.help: If true, collect and output cluster runtime logs.

inputSpec.name: log_level
inputSpec.label: Spark log level
inputSpec.help: Spark log level: WARN, INFO, DEBUG, TRACE.

outputSpec.name: report
outputSpec.label: SQL execution report
outputSpec.help: Debug report with query status and execution times.

outputSpec.name: export_output
outputSpec.label: Exported CSV files
outputSpec.help: Array of exported CSV result files when export=true.
